prompts.name: 阿波罗11号登月舱LM-5鹰号蓝图与月球渲染
prompts.content:
一位专业[DISCIPLINE]设计师为[SUBJECT]制作的展示板——[ICONIC FEATURES / ERA]，左侧为带有标注和尺寸的黑白2D技术图纸，中央为展示[KEY INTERNAL COMPONENTS / MATERIALS]的爆炸轴测图，右侧为[SUBJECT]在[ICONIC ENVIRONMENT / SCENE]中的写实3D渲染，配合[LIGHTING / ATMOSPHERE / MOTION DETAILS]；视觉风格从[TECHNICAL / ARCHIVAL TONES]过渡到[EMOTIONAL / ATMOSPHERIC COLOR PALETTE]，简洁的网格布局，博物馆级工业设计展示，超精细电影级真实感，标题栏写着「[TITLE] — [YEAR / VARIANT / TAGLINE]」。

查看ALT获取灵感
prompts.author: Alexandra Aisling
prompts.nameEn: Apollo 11 Lunar Module LM-5 Eagle Blueprint & Moon Render
prompts.contentEn:
An expert [DISCIPLINE] designer’s presentation board for [SUBJECT] — [ICONIC FEATURES / ERA], featuring black-and-white 2D technical drawings with annotations and dimensions on the left, an exploded axonometric diagram revealing [KEY INTERNAL COMPONENTS / MATERIALS] in the center, and a photorealistic 3D render of [SUBJECT] in [ICONIC ENVIRONMENT / SCENE] on the right, with [LIGHTING / ATMOSPHERE / MOTION DETAILS]; visual style transitions from [TECHNICAL / ARCHIVAL TONES] to [EMOTIONAL / ATMOSPHERIC COLOR PALETTE], clean grid layout, museum-grade industrial design presentation, ultra-detailed cinematic realism, title block reading “[TITLE] — [YEAR / VARIANT / TAGLINE]”.

See ALTs for ideas

prompts.name: 写实侦探证据板 - 复古悬案之谜
prompts.content:
一张侦探调查[SUBJECT/MYSTERY]的证据板。软木板表面布满大头针固定的物品：拍立得照片上写着手写日期，一张街道地图上圈出了多个地点，剪报上有高亮的段落，便利贴上写着理论和问号，打印文件上有黑色涂黑条。红线连接着板上相关的证据，形成一张关系网。彩色图钉。一盏裸灯泡投下戏剧性的阴影。一些纸张上有咖啡杯渍。氛围充满执着、深夜、黑色电影风格——有人已经为此拼凑了好几个月。几个图钉掉了下来，暗示最近有疯狂的活动。

查看ALT获取灵感
prompts.author: Alexandra Aisling
prompts.nameEn: Photorealistic Detective Board - Vintage Cold Case Mystery
prompts.contentEn:
A detective's evidence board investigating [SUBJECT/MYSTERY]. Cork surface covered with pinned items: polaroid photographs with handwritten dates, a street map with circled locations, newspaper clippings with highlighted passages, sticky notes with theories and question marks, and printed documents with redacted black bars. Red string connects related evidence across the board, creating a web of connections. Thumbtacks in primary colors. A single bare bulb casts dramatic shadows. Coffee ring stains on some papers. The atmosphere is obsessive, late-night, noir—someone has been piecing this together for months. A few pins have fallen, suggesting frantic recent activity.

Check ALTs for ideas

prompts.name: 复古数码相机人像 | Y2K美学与怀旧风格
prompts.content:
特写俯拍一台黑色2000年代初紧凑型数码相机，放置在有纹理的蓝色牛仔布上。背面LCD屏幕亮着，显示一张低像素、颗粒感强、闪光灯照射的自拍照片，画面中是一位年轻女性。屏幕上的主体有深色波浪卷发，脸颊和鼻子上涂着浓重的Y2K风格粉色腮红，画着上扬眼线，涂着光泽唇膏，侧肩凝视，目光柔和。相机机身可见按钮和方向键。浅景深，焦点清晰地在LCD屏幕上，边缘略微模糊。
———————————————
Nano Banana Pro对加入@higgsfield_ai的用户提供一年无限使用。只剩不到一天了，不要错过。
prompts.author: ΛRMIN | AI
prompts.nameEn: Vintage Digital Camera Portrait | Y2K Aesthetic & Nostalgia
prompts.contentEn:
Close-up, top-down shot of a black early 2000s compact digital camera resting on textured blue denim fabric. The rear LCD screen is illuminated, displaying a lo-fi, grainy, flash-lit selfie of a young woman. Subject on screen has dark wavy hair, heavy Y2K-style pink blush on cheeks and nose, winged eyeliner, and glossy lips, looking over her shoulder with a soft gaze. The camera body has visible buttons and a directional pad. Shallow depth of field with focus sharp on the LCD screen and slightly blurred edges.
———————————————
Nano Banana Pro is unlimited for a year for everyone joining @higgsfield_ai. Less than a day left, don’t miss it.

prompts.name: 复古专利图：自动脱帽装置蒸汽朋克艺术
prompts.content:
一份[INVENTION]的复古专利文件，仿照1800年代末美国专利局的申请风格。页面包含精确的技术图纸，带有编号标注（图1、图2、图3），展示正面、侧面和分解视图。钢笔墨水手写注释描述机械原理。纸张呈陈旧象牙色，带有锈斑和柔软的折痕。角落有压纹印章和红色蜡封。底部有发明者的手写签名和日期。整张图片像一份复原的档案文件——权威、历史感十足，略带神秘。

查看ALT获取灵感
prompts.author: Alexandra Aisling
prompts.nameEn: Vintage Patent: Automatic Hat-Tipping Device Steampunk Art
prompts.contentEn:
A vintage patent document for [INVENTION], styled after late 1800s United States Patent Office filings. The page features precise technical drawings with numbered callouts (Fig. 1, Fig. 2, Fig. 3) showing front, side, and exploded views. Handwritten annotations in fountain-pen ink describe mechanisms. The paper is aged ivory with foxing stains and soft fold creases. An official embossed seal and red wax stamp appear in the corner. A hand-signed inventor's name and date appear at the bottom. The entire image feels like a recovered archival document—authoritative, historic, and slightly mysterious.

Check ALTs for ideas

prompts.nameEn: Historic NYC Flatiron Building & 1910s Cars - Woodrow Wilson

prompts.name: 复古褐色调人像：两位1930年代时尚女性
prompts.content:
想象你是一位专业的照片修复师。完美修复这张照片。使其清晰锐利并提高分辨率。去除划痕。让它看起来像是现在拍摄的。

这是我曾祖母的照片。我在Adobe Firefly应用中使用Nano Banana Pro。
prompts.author: Kris Kashtanova
prompts.nameEn: Vintage Sepia Portrait: Two Women in 1930s Fashion
prompts.contentEn:
Imagine you are a professional photo restorer. Restore this photo perfectly. Make it sharp and improve resolution. Get rid of scratches. Make it a way it would look if it was taken now. 

Photo of my great-grandmother. I use Nano Banana Pro in Adobe Firefly app.
